case_title: CALL CAR COLLISION VS. TITAN AUTO INSURANCE OF NEW MEXICO, INC.

docket_entries.description: LETTER FROM DEFENDANT WITH ATTACHED PROOF OF PAYMENT, AND REQUEST FOR A COPY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. (ADVISED BY PHONE THAT SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT HASN'T BEEN FILED YET.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,784.50 FILED BY CALL CAR COLLISION AS TO DEFENDANT TITAN AUTO INSURANCE OF NEW MEXICO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2009 - JUDGMENT.
